requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety, Enclosure Protection, and Extreme-Heat Derating
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全、防护等级和极端高温降额
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全、防護等級和極端高溫降額

summary.en: South Sudan charger projects should use IEC 61851-1 as the baseline safety reference for conductive EV supply equipment and IEC 61851-23 for DC charging stations. Because formal SSNBS EVSE-specific capacity and published charger rules are nascent, project specifications should explicitly require protective earthing, residual-current protection, insulation monitoring where applicable, emergency stop provisions, over-temperature protection, enclosure ingress protection, surge protection, and site installation verification. Outdoor equipment must be derated for extreme heat, dust, solar loading, diesel-generator environments, and limited maintenance access.
summary.zh: 南苏丹充电桩项目应以IEC 61851-1作为电动汽车传导供电设备的安全基线，并以IEC 61851-23作为直流充电站基线。由于SSNBS针对EVSE的正式能力和已发布充电桩规则仍处于初期，项目规范应明确要求保护接地、剩余电流保护、适用时的绝缘监测、急停措施、过温保护、外壳防护、浪涌保护和现场安装验证。户外设备必须针对极端高温、粉尘、太阳辐照、柴油发电机环境和有限维护条件进行降额。
summary.zht: 南蘇丹充電樁項目應以IEC 61851-1作為電動汽車傳導供電設備的安全基線，並以IEC 61851-23作為直流充電站基線。由於SSNBS針對EVSE的正式能力和已發布充電樁規則仍處於初期，項目規範應明確要求保護接地、剩餘電流保護、適用時的絕緣監測、急停措施、過溫保護、外殼防護、浪湧保護和現場安裝驗證。戶外設備必須針對極端高溫、粉塵、太陽輻照、柴油發電機環境和有限維護條件進行降額。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)
IEC 62262 — Degrees of protection against external mechanical impacts (IK Code)
SSNBS standards adoption or project specification where applicable

summary.en: China's comparable domestic baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, with China-specific connector, signalling, and communication assumptions. GB/T 18487 evidence can support an engineering gap review but does not replace IEC 61851 test evidence, enclosure tests, thermal derating data, or site-specific installation documentation for South Sudan projects.
summary.zh: 中国可比国内基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，并包含中国特有接口、信号和通信假设。GB/T 18487证据可支持工程差距审查，但不能替代南苏丹项目所需的IEC 61851测试证据、外壳测试、热降额数据或现场特定安装文件。
summary.zht: 中國可比國內基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，並包含中國特有接口、信號和通訊假設。GB/T 18487證據可支持工程差距審查，但不能替代南蘇丹項目所需的IEC 61851測試證據、外殼測試、熱降額數據或現場特定安裝文件。

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851 clause matrix, accredited IEC safety reports for the final South Sudan configuration, IP and IK certificates, residual-current device specifications, surge-protection design, earthing instructions, dust and heat derating calculations, spare-filter and maintenance plans, and commissioning procedures for weak-grid or generator-backed sites. Any change from GB/T to Type 2 / CCS2, OCPP, cable length, enclosure, modem, cooling path, or protection device can invalidate earlier safety evidence.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851逐条矩阵、最终南苏丹配置的认可IEC安全报告、IP和IK证书、剩余电流装置规格、浪涌保护设计、接地说明、粉尘和高温降额计算、滤网备件和维护计划，以及适用于弱电网或柴油发电机供电场站的调试程序。任何从GB/T改为Type 2 / CCS2、OCPP、电缆长度、外壳、通信模块、冷却路径或保护装置的变化，都可能使既有安全证据失效。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851逐條矩陣、最終南蘇丹配置的認可IEC安全報告、IP和IK證書、剩餘電流裝置規格、浪湧保護設計、接地說明、粉塵和高溫降額計算、濾網備件和維護計劃，以及適用於弱電網或柴油發電機供電場站的調試程序。任何從GB/T改為Type 2 / CCS2、OCPP、電纜長度、外殼、通訊模塊、冷卻路徑或保護裝置的變化，都可能使既有安全證據失效。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific — SSNBS EVSE-specific mandatory scope is unconfirmed; IEC 61851 safety evidence and environmental derating should be treated as mandatory in donor, utility, fleet, and professionally specified projects
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and certification; it is not direct IEC 61851 evidence for South Sudan without a clause-level gap assessment and final-configuration testing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat IEC 61851 evidence, IP/IK enclosure protection, surge protection, and extreme-heat derating as core South Sudan project requirements. GB/T 18487 evidence may help a gap assessment but is not enough for a final IEC-aligned charger configuration.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将IEC 61851证据、IP/IK外壳防护、浪涌保护和极端高温降额视为南苏丹项目的核心要求。GB/T 18487证据可用于差距评估，但不足以覆盖最终IEC体系充电桩配置。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將IEC 61851證據、IP/IK外殼防護、浪湧保護和極端高溫降額視為南蘇丹項目的核心要求。GB/T 18487證據可用於差距評估，但不足以覆蓋最終IEC體系充電樁配置。
